title: Equipment & Tools
description: All the equipment you need to know to work at the factory

sections.text: The first thing you must do when arriving at the factory is leave your shoes and put on the indoor footwear.

sections.title: What you need to know:
items: 👢 You will use this footwear throughout your stay at the factory (outside production)
🚫 You cannot use your personal shoes inside the facilities

sections.title: Steps when entering the production access:

animatedSteps.title: Hand washing
animatedSteps.description: Wash your hands following the established protocol (soap, scrub 20 sec, rinse, dry, sanitize)

animatedSteps.title: Work overalls
animatedSteps.description: Put on the work overalls provided by the company

animatedSteps.title: Hair and beard net
animatedSteps.description: Put on the hair net. If you have a beard, also put on the beard net

animatedSteps.title: Login with key
animatedSteps.description: Log in with your personal key before going down to the production area

sections.text: In the pre-production access you must complete your equipment before entering the work area.

animatedSteps.title: Footwear change
animatedSteps.description: Change your indoor shoes for the blue safety rubber boots (provided by the company)

animatedSteps.title: Hand washing
animatedSteps.description: Wash your hands again following the full protocol

animatedSteps.title: Sleeve covers
animatedSteps.description: Put on the plastic sleeve covers

animatedSteps.title: Gloves
animatedSteps.description: Put on the gloves corresponding to your work station

sections.title: Tools at your work station:
items: 🔪 Knife – provided at the work station
🪡 Tweezers – provided at the work station

sections.text: Tools DO NOT move from their station. You move when it's your turn, but the tools stay where they are.

sections.title: Rules about tools:
items: Moving knives or tweezers from one station to another
Taking tools outside the production area
Using tools from another station without authorization
